name: Oriath's End
explicitMods: Enemies you Kill during Effect have a 29% chance to Explode, dealing a tenth of their maximum Life as Damage of a Random Element
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: a mote of flame, kindled by fury
and all in his path were obliterated.

name: Badge of the Brotherhood
explicitMods: Your Maximum Frenzy Charges is equal to your Maximum Power Charges
9% increased Cooldown Recovery Rate of Travel Skills per Frenzy Charge
9% increased Effect of Elusive on you per Power Charge
21% chance to lose a Frenzy Charge when you use a Travel Skill
21% chance to lose a Power Charge when you gain Elusive
flavourText: Greater than any blade, agility and intellect will be your weapons.

name: Kalandra's Touch
flavourText: On one hand, you have a choice.
On the other, you have its twin.

name: Legacy of the Rose
implicitMods: +25% Chance to Block Attack Damage while wielding a Staff
explicitMods:
Grants Level 20 Summon Shaper Memory
Grants Level 20 Shaper's Ire, which will be used by Shaper Memory
+5 to Level of all Spell Skill Gems

Gain 1 Remembrance when you spend a total of 200 Energy
Shield with no Shaper Memory Summoned
flavourText: We shared a memory of your mother,
a memory of roses, of autumn.
One day, I will be but a memory as well,
but I will never leave your side.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Raises a spectral version of a defeated foe as a minion to fight for you in battle.
explicitMods: Minions have +52% to all Elemental Resistances
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Animates a melee weapon or armour, attaching it to an invisible Guardian that fights by your side. Animating multiple items attaches them to the same Guardian. You cannot animate unidentified items. Cannot be used by Traps or Mines. If your Guardian dies you cannot summon an Animated Guardian again in that area.
explicitMods: Can use Items requiring up to Level 100
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

simple ethos: why make the effort, when

socketedItems.secDescrText: Grants a buff which lets you deal more physical damage.
